title: 知ってほしくて風水活動

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While walking through the school, I happen upon
a group of students gathered around a
noticeboard...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Check out my very own feng shui newspaper! Go
on and grab a copy! It's a must-read!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! I know, right? I wanted to spread
the word about feng shui!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Until now, I've just been borrowing empty
classrooms to teach feng shui classes.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I never got too many students, though... And
maybe people just don't know about feng shui in
the first place...
choice_data_list: I had no idea you were doing that...
I had no idea you were doing that...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Anyway! That's why I thought I should raise
awareness about feng shui!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And to do that, I need to put it right where
everyone can see it. So I put up a newspaper on
the noticeboard! What do you think? Great idea,
huh? ☆

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, so how do we check our horoscope? Do we
need our star sign or blood type or whatever?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Actually, this is different! It's called Nine-Star Qi,
and it works by taking the year and month you
were born, then—

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Wait, wait. "Nine Star"? So like, these aren't
horoscopes?

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
This stuff sounds really niche. I'm pretty sure it'll
go over my head...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about that! There are some aspects
of feng shui you can put into practice right
away—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ahem! What's the meaning of this commotion?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I should have known. At it again, are you Rickey?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
H-hold on a second! I just want to support
everyone so they can all give 100%!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I told you not to post anything on the noticeboard without permission! I'll be confiscating those newspapers! Next time, go through the proper channels!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Well, that didn't work out...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I mean, getting permission is one thing, but... it
sounded like those girls were intimidated by the
whole idea...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Geez. I made feng shui sound confusing again.
choice_data_list:
They'll come to understand it better as they get
familiar with it.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: That's it!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That's exactly it! Everyone just needs to get more
familiar with feng shui!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If they see it every day, it'll become part of their
daily lives... Okay, if I stick to it, I can make this
happen!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Trainer! I got my spark back!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But what's the angle? I should probably share
some more detailed information before putting a
newspaper up on the noticeboard...
choice_data_list:
Let's meet with someone with the relevant
experience!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Social media! Wow, that's a fantastic idea! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Jordaaaan!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! You, like, surprised me. ...What is it? You
here to tell me my lucky color or something?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yes! And I'm going to start posting about that
stuff on social media every day too!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Can you tell me how to get everyone to look at
my posts?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Wait, "everyone" as in, like, putting the info out for the whole world to see? I can get behind that! Okay, so first, you've really gotta nail the look...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, Copano Rickey posts a few nail photos
along with some feng shui advice. Apparently, her
posts get a decent number of views.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Relevant experience? Oh, I think I know someone
who fits the bill!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, okay. ☆ Well, if you're talking about
making a connection with each of your fans, then
you've come to the right person!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Let's get started right away! It's time for Rickey
the feng shui Umadol to shine!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! Did you say "Umadol"?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If you sing with a smile every single day, you'll
have a huge audience in no time. ☆ Just do some
feng shui while you sing! That'll do it!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: O...kay?! That could be pretty entertaining!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Copano Rickey has started down a
completely new path... but I want to keep
supporting her efforts all the same.
